articles.title: Palestinian fisherman killed by Israeli fire off central Gaza coast
articles.summary: Palestinian fisherman killed by Israeli fire off central Gaza coast Israeli forces shot and killed a Palestinian fisherman off the coast of central Gaza, Wafa news agency is reporting, citing local sources. According to the sources, Israeli naval vessels fired at the vessel while it was operating off the coast of Deir el-Balah.  The victim  was identified as Mohammad Mousa Abu Jiab.

articles.title: Yemen condemns Iranian attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait
articles.summary: Yemen condemns Iranian attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait Yemen’s foreign ministry condemned Iran’s recent attacks on Bahrain and Kuwait, describing them as a dangerous escalation and accusing Tehran of threatening regional security and stability. In a statement, the ministry said the attacks exposed what it called the “aggressive and terrorist nature” of the Iranian government. Yemen joined several other Arab countries, including Egypt, Qatar, Palestine and Saudi Arabia, in condemning the strikes. articles.summary: Video: Senior Iranian official rules out Trump-Khamenei meeting Mohsen Rezaei, a senior military adviser to Iran’s supreme leader, said negotiations with the United States are currently at a standstill and ruled out the possibility of a meeting between US President Donald Trump and Mojtaba Khamenei, according to an interview with CNN. Rezaei said Washington must release $24 billion in frozen Iranian assets as a “test of trust” to move negotiations forward, arguing that the funds belong to Iran. articles.title: Hezbollah claims drone and rocket attacks on Israeli forces in south Lebanon
articles.summary: Hezbollah claims drone and rocket attacks on Israeli forces in south Lebanon Hezbollah said it carried out a series of attacks against Israeli forces in southern Lebanon, including a strike on an Israeli army command headquarters in Naqoura using an Ababil attack drone. In separate statements, the group said it also targeted Israeli soldiers on the southern outskirts of Haddatha with two drones and attacked a gathering of Israeli troops and military vehicles near Yahmar al-Shaqif using rocket barrages and artillery fire. articles.title: Hundreds march in Manchester in support of Palestinians
articles.summary: Hundreds march in Manchester in support of Palestinians Hundreds of people carrying Palestinian flags marched through the streets of Manchester to express solidarity with Palestinians and call on the British government to end its support for Israel. Videos shared by Friends of Palestine in Greater Manchester showed demonstrators carrying flags, chanting pro-Palestinian slogans and displaying a large banner reading “End the Israeli Occupation”.
